completed_tasks.name: Fix missing runtime dependencies in pyproject.toml
Fix FTS5 synchronization and consolidate repository files
Fix inverted checksum comparison and remove hardcoded model path
Replace placeholder embeddings with real ST and GGUF implementations
Remove vector search fallback and make vsearch fail fast
Improve SQLite connection safety for async/multi-threaded contexts

decisions.decision: FTS5 synchronization uses SQLite triggers on external content tables
decisions.rationale: Eliminates manual FTS sync and keeps virtual tables automatically consistent

decisions.decision: sqlite_repository.py deleted, all access consolidated into repositories.py
decisions.rationale: Removes stale duplicate code and unifies repository pattern

decisions.decision: Vector search fails fast with RuntimeError when sqlite-vec is unavailable
decisions.rationale: Silent BM25 fallback masked configuration problems

decisions.decision: MCP server uses connection-per-request via DatabaseConnection
decisions.rationale: Prevents ProgrammingError from shared connection reuse across threads/async tasks

decisions.decision: Heavy ML libraries remain optional extras in pyproject.toml
decisions.rationale: Keeps core install lightweight while supporting full functionality when extras are installed

uncommitted_files: Untracked: numerous source files, tests, docs, and reports (see git status)
next_action: Run `/gsd-plan-phase 2` to begin planning Phase 2: CLI Core Completion
context_notes: Phase 01 execution finished successfully with all 6 plans verified and passed. There are uncommitted modifications and many untracked files in the working tree that predate or are unrelated to Phase 01. The next logical step is Phase 02 planning.
